name: Venison Nacho Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the venison and onion in a nonstick pan over medium heat until the meat browns and the onion is soft.
2. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Spread the refried beans evenly in a flat, 10-inch casserole dish.
4. Layer the cooked venison mixture over the beans.
5. Sprinkle chopped green chiles over the top of the meat.
6. Cover with grated cheese and taco sauce.
7. Bake at 400°F for 25 minutes or until heated through.
8. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with chopped green onions and sliced olives.
9. Serve hot with tortilla chips on the side.
